result:
My verification is complete and decisive. Two findings worth noting precisely:

1. **s-notation is genuinely unified.** Every regex hit for `t_commit`/`t_read`/`x0(t)` traced to filename substrings (`commitmen**t_r**eadout_gap_report.md`, `checkpoin**t_commit**ment_sanity_report.md`), not variables. Every `x0(...)` is `x0(s)`. Pre-revision had 13 (proposal) + 2 (plan) raw-`t` instances; post has zero genuine ones.

2. **One real wrinkle, pre-existing and out-of-scope:** both docs still say "No project-specific experiment has been run" / "Nothing empirical," yet `results/` contains `feasibility_report.md`, `score_sde_validation_report.md`, and `video_conditioning_derisk_report.md` dated 2026-06-10. The new B2 scope note gestures at this but deliberately leaves the status frozen (which the critique instructed: "edit markdown only").

Here is my evaluation.

---

REVIEWER INDEPENDENCE EVALUATION — foley-cw revision vs. PI critique (critic.md)

1. SCORE TABLE (d1 = addresses substance; d2 = preserves anchor+backbone; d3 = no new issues)

| Group | d1 | d2 | d3 | One-line rationale |
|-------|----|----|----|--------------------|
| A1 retitle / A2 working abstract | 5 | 5 | 5 | Subtitle changed to "Commitment and Readout Maps"; pruning removed from headline; working abstract added verbatim with explicit "planned claim, not empirical" disclaimer. |
| A3 s-notation unification | 5 | 5 | 5 | s_commit/s_read/x0(s)/gap propagated to glossary, thesis, hypotheses, contributions, tiers, next gate; grep confirms 0 genuine residual raw-t. |
| A4 novelty sentence + negative boundary / A5 speciation lineage | 5 | 5 | 5 | Sharper novelty + negative-boundary sentences adopted verbatim; lineage expanded to 4 lines with speciation/coupled-multimodal theory; citations correctly marked TODO, not asserted. |
| A6 policy-crowded landscape paragraph | 5 | 5 | 5 | "Why policy alone is no longer enough" section added; SMC-ITA + multi-verifier described, hedged "TODO verify BibTeX"; policy reframed as table-stakes, claim orthogonal. |
| A7 contributions reorg (internal readout + causal not buried) | 5 | 5 | 5 | C1–C5 restructured exactly as recommended; internal readout (C3) and causal validation (C4) now first-class; measurement folded into C1 (permitted); cheap verifier preserved inside C5. |
| A8 hypotheses H1–H7 | 5 | 5 | 5 | All seven hypotheses present and mapped to contributions; all flagged planned/untested; old "scalar insufficient" folded into H6. |
| A9 correctness factorization (proposal §7) | 5 | 5 | 5 | New §7 with match(value, anchor) factorization, time-independence, out-of-scope boundary; mirrored in plan Phase-4 preflight and cross-referenced. |
| A10 claim tiers / A11 anti-overclaim / A12 Figure-1 taxonomy | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5-tier ladder (METHOD/SCIENCE/CAUSAL/NEGATIVE/STOP) adopted; all 5 new anti-overclaim rules added; Figure-1 decision taxonomy added; tiers explicitly guarded as fallback ladder, not co-equal claims. |
| B2 PI-amendments section / B3 Phase 0A micro-map | 5 | 5 | 4 | All 10 amendments listed; Phase 0A fully specified (inputs/endpoints/tokens, "not evidence, not GO_MAP"). Deduction: B2 scope note points to "current diagnostic record" in results/ while docs still assert "no experiment run" — minor pre-existing dissonance now made visible. |
| B4 internal-feature logging / B5 cache manifests + post-hoc | 5 | 5 | 5 | Logging mandated in Phase 0.1(d) + Phase-1 hard caching + Hard Constraint; 3 cache manifests in Files-to-Produce; "log now, analyze later"; analysis stays non-blocking. |
| B6 A_independent cap / B7 decision taxonomy / B8 α-robust ordering in GO_MAP | 5 | 5 | 5 | τ_video≥0.90 cap with 5-step rule; 6-category taxonomy; α-robust ordering operationalized (Kendall τ, θ_order pre-registered) and made a hard GO_MAP requirement. |
| B9 coupling ablation / B10 second-checkpoint / B11 causal intervention | 5 | 5 | 5 | Phases 3c (coupling, P1), 3d (checkpoint sanity, P1), 3b.2 (causal, ~50 clips, 3 points) all added with pre-registered predictions; causal framed as validating—not replacing—the fork-agreement definition. |
| B12 Phase-4 SMC-ITA positioning + baselines / B13 correctness factorization | 5 | 5 | 5 | SMC-ITA + multi-verifier added as mandatory baselines; map-as-scheduler framing; matched-budget no-superiority warning; correctness factorization in preflight, consistent with proposal §7. |
| B14 launch commands / B15 first-response / B16 watch-list | 5 | 5 | 5 | Five launch commands (0A→4); first-response keyed to Phase 0A with 7 endpoints; watch-list expanded 10→17 with all 7 mandated items. |

2. GAP ANALYSIS (groups with any score ≤ 3)

None. No group scored ≤ 3; no group fails the critique. One sub-threshold blemish (B2/B3 d3 = 4), surfaced here because a skeptical reviewer should not bury it:

- Offending new text — EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md line 42: "Evidence-status sections below are intentionally unchanged by this revision; the current diagnostic record lives in `orbit-research/ORBIT_STATE.json` and `results/`."
- Conflicting retained text — FINAL_PROPOSAL_SHORT.md line 7 and EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md line 5: "fresh-start. No project-specific experiment has been run."; EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md line 67: "Nothing empirical."
- Fact on disk — `results/` contains `feasibility_report.md`, `score_sde_validation_report.md`, `phase0_mmaudio_validation.json`, `video_conditioning_derisk_report.md` (2026-06-10): Phase-0 feasibility/de-risk probes that have in fact run.
- Adjudication — this is NOT a critique-response failure: (a) the dissonance is pre-existing (the .prerevise.1 files carried the identical "no experiment" line), and (b) critic.md explicitly ordered "Edit markdown only / Do not claim anything has been validated," so freezing evidence-status was compliant. It is not a fabrication or a claim-tier upgrade (if anything it under-claims). But it is a live internal-consistency item the PI should reconcile before circulation — update the status lines to acknowledge Phase-0 feasibility probing, or qualify/relocate those `results/` artifacts. Hence d3 = 4, not 5; it does not drag the row below "adequately addressed."

No other group has a sub-score below 5. Notably, the revision also repaired a pre-existing broken cross-reference (pre-plan line 7 pointed to nonexistent `FINAL_PROPOSAL.md`; post-plan correctly points to `FINAL_PROPOSAL_SHORT.md`) and introduced no broken refs, no orphaned tokens, and no orphaned output files.

3. PART C5 CONSISTENCY CHECKLIST (each item: yes/no + evidence)

- s notation unified — YES. grep over both post files: zero genuine `t_commit`/`t_read`/`x0(t)` variables (all hits are `commitment_readout_*` / `checkpoint_commitment_*` filename substrings); 100% of `x0(...)` are `x0(s)`; pre→post raw-t count 15→0. Glossary adds "Generation progress s" (proposal line 54); thesis/hypotheses/contributions/tiers/next-gate all use s-notation.

- Phase 0A added — YES. EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md §7 "Phase 0A — Video-Conditioned Micro-Map Sanity Test" (lines 136–166) with inputs (12–16 clips, K=8, N=8), sanity endpoints, "not publishable evidence, does not license GO_MAP," tokens GO_FULL_PHASE0/FIX_*; phased-flow line 107; Files-to-Produce lines 79–80; proposal Next Gate line 212.

- internal logging mandatory — YES. Phase 0.1(d) hooks (line 172); blockquote "internal feature logging is required before any large Phase 1/2 generation … log now, analyze later" (line 174); Phase-1 hard caching requirement (line 210); Hard Constraint (line 435); watch-list item 9 (line 520); analysis explicitly non-blocking for GO_MAP.

- A_independent cap added — YES. Phase 1 "High-A_independent cap / video-determined rule," τ_video default 0.90 with 5 numbered steps (lines 243–251); VIDEO_DETERMINED in taxonomy (line 301), commitment_map.csv (line 89), watch-list item 5 (line 516); τ_video pre-registered (line 58).

- α-robust ordering added — YES. Phase 3 operationalization with Kendall τ / ordering_stability_score / θ_order (lines 294–298); GO_MAP token requires "α-robust ordering (ordering_stability_score ≥ θ_order, no Tier-1 reversal)" (line 313); θ_order frozen pre-headline (line 58); proposal glossary + C1 + anti-overclaim rule (line 180).

- SMC-ITA baseline added — YES. Phase 4 positioning (line 377), preflight baseline definition (line 384), baselines list (line 403), Baseline Requirements (line 453), watch-list item 14 (line 525), matched-budget no-superiority warning (line 405); proposal lineage line 83 and anti-overclaim line 181.

- correctness factorization added — YES. Proposal new §7 (lines 132–138: `axis correctness = match(readable axis value, video/event anchor)`, time-independent matching, holistic out-of-scope); plan Phase-4 preflight (line 388) and Hard Constraint (line 429), cross-referenced "consistent with proposal §7" both directions.

- policy demoted from headline to downstream scheduler — YES. Subtitle changed from "Axis-Gated Candidate Pruning for Cross-Modal Audio-Visual Binding" to "Commitment and Readout Maps for Cross-Modal Foley Generation" (line 4); pivot "(5) policy as a downstream scheduler — not the main novelty and not a head-to-head fight against SMC-ITA" (line 24); "The policy layer is therefore table-stakes" (line 32); C5 "scheduler for population search, not a direct competitor" (lines 127–128); plan Project Summary "a scheduler consuming the map, not the headline" (line 17).

All eight checklist items: YES.

CAVEAT BEFORE VERDICT: The critique (Parts A/B/C) is fully and faithfully executed — backbone preserved (self-target maps, A_independent normalization, Phase-0 reliability gate, smallest-valid-α, ODE-target vs fork-majority, bootstrap-by-video, no premature policy claims all intact), no fabricated/asserted-verified results, citations TODO-flagged, notation unified, cross-references sound. The one item the PI should reconcile before circulating is orthogonal to the critique: the "no experiment has been run" / "Nothing empirical" status lines are now stale against the Phase-0 probe artifacts in results/. That is a documentation-hygiene reconciliation, not a critique gap requiring another revision round of A/B/C.

SCORE_DELTA: POSITIVE
